conventions.name: workspace-packages-required-files
conventions.description: Workspace packages must include package.json and tsconfig.json.

conventions.name: api-routes-use-middleware
conventions.description: API route handlers must use shared middleware from @/utils/middleware.

conventions.name: v1-api-routes-use-api-middleware
conventions.description: Public v1 API routes must use API key middleware from @/utils/api-middleware.

conventions.name: queue-routes-use-forwarding-handler
conventions.description: Forwarding queue routes must use the shared queue forwarding helper.

conventions.name: queue-routes-use-vercel-queue
conventions.description: Direct queue consumer routes must use @vercel/queue.

conventions.name: org-stats-routes-use-helper
conventions.description: Organization stats routes must use the shared createOrgStatsRoute helper.

conventions.name: validation-files-import-zod
conventions.description: Server action validation schemas must use Zod.

conventions.name: server-actions-use-safe-action
conventions.description: Callable server action modules must use next-safe-action clients from safe-action.ts.

conventions.name: route-pages-no-nested-components-folder
conventions.description: Route directories should colocate page files instead of using nested components/ folders.
